'''Vendara''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Vendara system/Legends|Vendara system]] in the [[Kwymar sector/Legends|Kwymar sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was home to the [[Vendaran]] species and the predatory mollusks called [[skeeg]].
